race.description: Thanks For The Memories Mdn Plate
race.comment: AMICAL (1) showed good tactical speed fresh at Balaklava but tired late into fourth. Has been kept fresh with 33 days in between and will prove tougher to reel in with added fitness. MR VEXATIOUS (5) has mixed his form in his debut prep, producing a better run last time at headquarters when sticking on gamely into fourth. Backs up quickly and if he improves again he's right in the mix. ELECTRIC BEEL (7) is a Cool Aza Bell filly for the Stokes yard that looks most capable of the debutants. Strips fitter for a recent trial win and draws well. Monitoring a market move. DIRTY DEAL (2) is another debutant that can make his presence felt.
